working_on: Phase 1.1 — prompt-pack Session 10: verify V1 decay parameters (BASE_HALF_LIFE = 60 days, MAX_FLOOR = 0.6) against five realistic trajectory scenarios under the engagement-depth distribution settled in S-0004.
outcome_summary: V1 decay parameters confirmed across all five trajectory scenarios (active low-rigor, active high-rigor, abandoned mid-rigor, mastery verification, backward inference). No revisions; Session 10 closed without an ADR per ROADMAP.md §1.1. Three findings recorded as observations (none triggering parameter changes): single direct_teaching @ depth 0.6 already crosses the 0.3 proficiency threshold and activates floor; mid-rigor floor sits exactly at threshold (0.30); high-rigor MASTERY unreachable through callbacks at typical depth ~0.4 alone (requires assessment events or sustained callbacks at depth ≥ 0.5). docs/learner-model.md V1-defaults paragraph extended; CHANGELOG entry under [Unreleased]; MemPalace decision drawer drawer_paideia_general_1d310bc491affc6ec6274280. Procedure side-fix: /start-engine no longer requires per-push user confirmation — invocation is itself the authorization (.claude/commands/start-engine.md, docs/operations/session-build-lifecycle.md, docs/operations/session-shutdown-sequence.md, .claude/settings.json updated). validate.py: 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns. Next: S-0006 (prompt-pack Session 11 — Historical Maximum Tracking).
